usual suspects up front burgos with sanchez los cano from cairo rao and as per in in the break yet again this time for oscar looking behind and well that intermediate sprint was starting to loom large if there was no wind the fear of it and indeed the reaction to that potential was live out front the intermediate sprint was taken by the only sprinter within the breakaway los cano bragging rights but beaten by phillipson phillips is absolutely delighted his second stage win of this welter and also a green jersey the raw said it all but uh raw describes the day for many phillips center of
